nasb.text: They gave him seventy pieces of silver from the house of Baal-berith with which Abimelech hired worthless and reckless fellows, and they followed him.

esv.text: And they gave him seventy pieces of silver out of the house of Baal-berith with which Abimelech hired worthless and reckless fellows, who followed him.

cnv.text: 他們就從巴力．比利土的廟裡，取了八百克銀子給亞比米勒，亞比米勒用這些銀子雇了一些無賴流氓，那些人就跟隨了他。

ccb.text: 从巴力·比利土的庙里拿了七十块银子给他。他用这些钱收买了一班无赖做随从。
